title: Aitmexcn Rope Toys for Large Medium Dogs, Indestructible Chew Toy, 37 Inch 5 Knots Tough Tug Toy for Teeth Cleaning, Tug of War
features: Indestructible Dog Toys for Aggressive Chewers - This 95 cm/ 37 inch Weight 760g XXL long dog rope toy with 5 knots is designed for medium and large dogs, durable and indestructible. Our dog toy rope is wrapped tightly with 3 thick rope strands, stronger than other rope toys

Safe Dog Rope Toy in 100% Cotton - Our dog chew toy is made of 100% natural cotton, non-toxic, tasteless and safer. It is the most safe dog toys that letting your dogs chew and play. While letting your dogs have fun with toys, their health is the most important thing

Tug Of War Dog Toys & Interaction - This long dog tug toy is long and strong enough for playing tug of war with dogs. Spending time with your dogs with this interactive dog toys, your dogs anxiety and boredom would decrease and your furniture like sofa would be safer

Tough Dog Chew Toys & Teeth Cleaning - The extra large size rope dog toy is perfect for dogs to chew and play with. When chewing this rope toy, your dogs can clean their teeth. Great fun and effective way for teeth cleaning

Attractive Rope Indoor and Outdoor - Colorful rope toys look more conspicuous and attractive for dogs and yourself. You and your dogs can better enjoy indoor and outdoor happy hours with this dog toy. Best gift for your furry friends
description: Product Description Specification Size : 95 cm / 37 inch (with 5 knots) Color: blue + green + red Material: 100% natural cotton Why Choose AITMEXCN Dog Rope Toy? AITMEXCN XXL Tough Dog Rope Toy Great Fun - this rope toy is perfect for indoor and outdoor, tug of war, throwing and other fun games for dogs. Machine Washable and Durable - our rope toy adopts 100% natural cotton material, which is washable when being dirty. Indestructible and tough rope toy - long rope toy with large knots would be more durable. Please note: if your furry friends are extremely aggressive, please play under your supervision to a longer life for the rope toy. 100% NATURAL COTTON Our dog chew toy is made of 100% natural cotton, non-toxic, tasteless and safer. STRONG BIG KNOT This 95 cm/ 37 inch XXL long dog rope toy with 5 knots is designed for medium and large dogs, durable and indestructible. DURABLE AND TOUGH TOUGH DOG CHEW TOYS Our dog toy rope is wrapped tightly with 3 thick rope strands, stronger than other rope toys
